lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-26D-465414 which is a certificate reference, not an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar found.

pairing_validation.motivation: Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' is identifiable in the invoice as the issuer (header and footer). Consignee 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' is identifiable in the invoice as Buyer and Consignee. Pairing validation passed on criteria 2 and 3. Note: the certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference, but consignor and consignee both match.

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Volvo Bus Corporation' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION' appears as issuer header on page 1 and page 2, and 'Volvo Bus Corporation' appears in footer on page 1 and page 2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare 'Volvo Bus Corporation' (certificate) with 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION' (invoice issuer header).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH after case normalization. Identical name.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate country: Sweden. Invoice: VAT No. SE556197382601 has SE prefix (Sweden), footer states 'Sweden', IBAN starts with SE.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Sweden confirmed via multiple sources.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found directly as invoice issuer
Name verification - exact match after case normalization
Country verification via VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE, footer address

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Volvo Bus Corporation, 405 08, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION' in header. After case normalization, both are 'volvo bus corporation' — exact match. Country Sweden is confirmed via VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE, and explicit 'Sweden' in footer. Direct match per 4.1.0 and 4.1.2. No need to proceed to 4.1.3 sequential checks.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' identifieras exakt i fakturans utställarblock som 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION'. Land Sverige bekräftas genom VAT-nummer med SE-prefix, IBAN med SE-prefix och explicit 'Sweden' i footer. MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Africa
consignee.invoice_value: Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Arica (Buyer and Consignee fields)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains 'Buyer:' field with 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' and a separate 'Consignee:' field with the same name.
comparison_steps.result: Primary billing field identified: Buyer field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' with invoice Buyer/Consignee 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'.

Certificate country: 'South Africa'. Invoice Buyer address: 'South Arica'. Note: 'South Arica' appears to be a minor OCR/spelling error for 'South Africa' (single character 'f' missing). However per strict rules this is a character-level difference in a country name.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice text reads 'South Arica' — this is missing the letter 'f' in 'Africa'. This is clearly a typographical/OCR error. Both Buyer and Consignee fields in the invoice show 'South Arica'. Given that: (1) the company name matches exactly, (2) the address matches exactly, (3) the only difference is a single missing character in 'Africa' → 'Arica', (4) 'South Arica' is not a real country while 'South Africa' is, this constitutes a clear single-character typo. By analogy to rule 4.1.3.8 (single character deviation with confirming identifiers), the exact company name match and address match serve as confirming identifiers. MATCH with note.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1: Buyer field identified as primary billing field
Country verification - 'South Africa' vs 'South Arica' - single character typo in non-existent country name, confirming identifiers present

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Africa'. Invoice Buyer and Consignee fields both show 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462, Johannesburg, South Arica'. Company name is an exact match. Address is an exact match. Country: 'South Africa' vs 'South Arica' — the letter 'f' is missing from 'Africa'. This is clearly a typographical error as 'South Arica' is not a real country, and the company name itself contains the word 'Africa' spelled correctly ('Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'). The company name serves as a confirming identifier per the principle in 4.1.3.8. The correct country is unambiguously South Africa. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' identifieras exakt i fakturans Buyer- och Consignee-fält. Adress matchar. Land: 'South Africa' vs 'South Arica' i fakturan — uppenbart stavfel (bokstaven 'f' saknas), bekräftat av att företagsnamnet i samma fält korrekt anger 'Africa'. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (model name 'BERE' and VIN are identifiers, not article numbers in the traditional sense). No article number field identified. Proceed to Priority 2.
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers to verify via Priority 1.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 - Controlled text matching: Identify identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.description: Certificate goods: 'UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS'. Identity-bearing main designation: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC'. Invoice Additional information: '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS'. After case normalization both contain 'volvo bus chassis model bere electric with 01 ess'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - identity-bearing main designation found in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate VIN: YV3U4W122TA226324. Invoice VIN No column: YV3U4W122TA226324. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC' found in invoice
Vehicle designation equivalence - 'UNIT' treated as non-identity-bearing prefix
Non-identity-bearing additions - quantity prefix '01' and 'WITH 01 ESS' verified as matching

evidence.raw_text:
01
UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC
WITH 01 ESS
VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324

01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL

evidence.description: Invoice goods description in additional information

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324'. Invoice goods (Additional information): '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS'. The identity-bearing main designation 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC' is found exactly in both documents after case normalization. The supplementary 'WITH 01 ESS' matches. The VIN YV3U4W122TA226324 matches exactly between certificate and invoice VIN No column. The invoice item table also shows 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI' which appears to be a truncated form, but the full description in the Additional information section provides the complete match. MATCH per 4.3.3.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS' identifieras exakt i fakturans 'Additional information'-sektion. VIN-numret YV3U4W122TA226324 matchar exakt. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate quantity (Box 7): 6100 kg. Invoice: 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100'. Numeric value 6100 found in invoice with unit KG.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - numeric value 6100 found with unit KG.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate value: 6100. Unit: kg. Both numeric value and unit are present.
Certificate Box 7 contains only one quantity: '6100 kg'. Box 6 contains '01' as item count but the verifying quantity is from Box 7.
comparison_steps.result: Single quantity value in Box 7: 6100 kg.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '6100 kg' without explicit GW/NW category. Only one weight value given in certificate. Invoice shows 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100' without explicit GW/NW category either. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value without category, value found in invoice, no contradicting alternative weight value of another category in invoice.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - numeric value 6100 identified in invoice
Quantity requirements - value and unit both present
Weight category - single value without GW/NW, matched in invoice without contradicting alternative
Verification against invoice - exact match of numeric value

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '6100 kg'. Invoice: 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100'. The numeric value 6100 matches exactly. The certificate unit is 'kg' and the invoice confirms '[KG]'. No GW/NW category is explicitly stated in either document, but per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, a single weight value without category that matches in the invoice with no contradicting alternative is acceptable as MATCH. No additional weight value of a different category exists in the invoice. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets vikt 6100 kg identifieras exakt i fakturans 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100'. Ingen viktkategori (GW/NW) specificerad i certifikatet men bara ett viktvärde anges och det matchar fakturans enda viktvärde. MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin: SE; 'the country of origin of the goods is the European Community'

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains 'Country of origin: SE' in the issuer block. Additionally, the VAT EXEMPT declaration states 'the country of origin of the goods is the European Community'.
comparison_steps.result: Origin identified: 'SE' (Sweden) in explicit Country of origin field, and 'European Community' in export declaration.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. Normalization: Sweden = SE. Match.

Additionally, the invoice states origin is 'European Community'. Sweden is an EU member state. This is consistent with the certificate's origin 'Sweden'. The certificate header also states 'EUROPEAN UNION' but this is a header designation for the certificate form, not the origin field. Box 3 states 'Sweden'.
comparison_steps.result: Consistent - Sweden is EU member state, invoice confirms EU origin.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via explicit 'Country of origin' field
EU member state - Sweden is EU member, consistent with 'European Community' declaration

evidence.source: Invoice page 1, Country of origin field
evidence.description: Explicit country of origin field in invoice

evidence.raw_text: the country of origin of the goods is the European Community
evidence.description: Export declaration confirming European Community origin

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice 'Country of origin: SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden — direct match after normalization per 4.5.4. Additionally, the invoice's export declaration states origin is 'European Community', and Sweden is an EU member state — this is fully consistent per 4.5.4.2. The certificate is an EU certificate issued in Sweden, and the origin 'Sweden' is explicitly confirmed in the invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' identifieras i fakturans fält 'Country of origin: SE' (ISO-kod för Sverige). Fakturans exportdeklaration bekräftar även 'European Community' som ursprung, vilket är konsistent med Sverige som EU-medlemsstat. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No LC reference found in certificate.
Document A identified as Certificate of Origin, Document B identified as Invoice. Single certificate, single invoice. No pairing ambiguity.
Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' found in invoice. Consignee 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd' found in invoice. Criteria 2 and 3 met.
Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' found directly as invoice issuer in header and footer.
VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE, footer 'Sweden' all confirm Sweden.
Invoice has Buyer field and separate Consignee field, both containing 'Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd'.
'South Africa' vs 'South Arica' — single character typo. Company name in same field correctly spells 'Africa'. Unambiguously the same country.
Identity-bearing main designation 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC' found exactly in invoice.
6100 kg found as 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100' in invoice.
Single weight value without GW/NW, matched in invoice, no contradicting alternative.
Invoice also declares 'European Community' origin. Sweden is EU member.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee country MISMATCH due to 'South Arica' vs 'South Africa'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The difference is a single missing character ('f' in 'Africa'). 'South Arica' is not a real country. The company name in the same field correctly spells 'Southern Africa'. This is an obvious typographical error. Per the principle in rule 4.1.3.8 (adapted for country), a single character deviation with strong confirming context (exact company name match containing 'Africa') is sufficient for MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice item table 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI' is truncated and may indicate a different product
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The full goods description in the 'Additional information' section of the invoice reads '01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS', which matches the certificate exactly. The item table appears to have layout truncation. The full description is authoritative.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate lacks invoice number reference, potentially invalid pairing
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 8.6, pairing validation requires at LEAST ONE of three criteria. Criteria 2 (consignor identifiable) and 3 (consignee identifiable) are both met. Invoice reference is not required when other criteria confirm pairing.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Volvo Bus Corporation, mottagaren Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd, varubeskrivningen (Volvo Bus Chassis Model BERE Electric med VIN-nummer), vikten 6100 kg och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_observations: Invoice contains 'South Arica' instead of 'South Africa' in Buyer and Consignee address fields — apparent typographical error (single missing letter 'f').
Invoice item table shows truncated material description 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERE WI' but full description is available in Additional information section.

sections.motivation: Mottagarens företagsnamn matchar exakt. Adress matchar. Land: 'South Africa' vs 'South Arica' — enstaka teckens stavfel, 'South Arica' existerar inte som land, och företagsnamnet i samma fält bekräftar 'Africa'. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: 01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC WITH 01 ESS, VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324
sections.invoice_value: 01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS, VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning av identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning. VIN-nummer verifierat som exakt matchning.
sections.motivation: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC' identifieras exakt i fakturans Additional information-sektion. VIN YV3U4W122TA226324 matchar exakt. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll av numeriskt värde. Enstaka viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori, matchat i faktura utan motstridande alternativ.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets vikt 6100 kg identifieras exakt som fakturans 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100'. Samma numeriska värde och enhet. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: ISO-kodsnormalisering: SE = Sweden. Konsistent med fakturans exportdeklaration om 'European Community'-ursprung.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' identifieras via ISO-kod 'SE' i fakturans Country of origin-fält. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat, konsistent med fakturans 'European Community'-deklaration. MATCH.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan verifieras mot fakturan. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. No MISMATCH found. No checkpoint has confidence below 0.85. All motivations are consistent with status values.
